channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 Launch Sparks Meme Frenzy as Gamers Balk at AI ‘Neural Rendering’
item.description: NVIDIA pitched DLSS 5 as a breakthrough in real-time rendering. Players saw something closer to AI overreach.

item.title: SEC will consider most crypto assets not securities under federal law
item.description: The interpretative notice included information on token taxonomy and what digital assets the regulator would consider a security under federal law.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto Gift Card Platform Bitrefill Discloses Hack, Points Finger at North Korean Groups
item.description: Bitrefill, which lets users swap Bitcoin, Dogecoin and other crypto assets for gift cards, disclosed a breach that took place on March 1.

item.title: Senator Tim Scott says market structure negotiations are advancing
item.description: The South Carolina Republican said he might see a draft of stablecoin yield language as soon as this week, and other issues continue to be negotiated.

item.title: Crypto Bill Stablecoin Yield Compromise Could Come This Week: Tim Scott
item.description: The White House is prepared to announce progress as soon as tomorrow on the issue plaguing crypto's market structure bill.

item.title: US lawmakers introduce bill to crack down on prediction markets war bets
item.description: The BETS OFF Act from two Democratic lawmakers came in response to several “highly unusual bets” on the US-Israel conflict with Iran, suggesting insider information.

item.title: Arizona Files Charges Against Kalshi, Calling Prediction Market an 'Illegal Gambling Operation'
item.description: Prediction market platform Kalshi was hit with 20 criminal charges in Arizona, which alleged that it's an "illegal gambling operation."

item.title: Moody’s brings credit ratings onchain with Canton Network integration
item.description: The move marks an early step toward embedding traditional risk assessment into blockchain-based financial infrastructure.

item.title: CFTC Clears Phantom to Connect Users to Regulated Derivatives Markets
item.description: Under the ruling, the developer of the Phantom self-custody crypto wallet avoids having to register as a broker.

item.title: Bitcoin's rally faces key hurdle with Wednesday's Fed meeting
item.description: Hot PPI inflation data in the morning and hawkish remarks by Powell in the afternoon would be the most damaging combination for risk assets, including crypto, Bitfinex analysts said.

item.title: U.S. SEC issues first-ever definitions for what crypto assets are securities
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission shared the informal guidance it'll use to classify crypto securities alongside its sister agency overseeing commodities.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $70K, bringing spot ETF buyers close to breakeven: Is the bull market back?
item.description: A Bitcoin price rally to $80,000 would bring the bulk of spot BTC ETF holders to breakeven on their positions and possibly signal the resumption of the crypto bull market.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC issues clarity for non-custodial crypto wallet providers to facilitate trades. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5aSFpnZ0VoYkV1Nmx5M2JJS2ltZjZLQU9zcm45Mk1ydkVBMWZwVzdzUTdQblpsOUkyRzhZSW9GY2VUcHUyUTZwNWw3YXg4WF9lbGhsZXc3M2FuRFlYcTJpcWZ3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC issues clarity …

item.title: 🚨 BIG: The SEC says most crypto assets are not securities, including staking, airdrops, and Bitcoin mining, providing new regulatory clarity. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBtZXhoN2hXNmsyanpEMlRZb3dQYm5POTg0T2pBRVlEdTdMdzh4TkJaZ2psNFdlZVU3Y29UZjFDTFd6NHpPWm8xR2JhZkFISjU0S2hHSkdWZzVXOGstaWN1Zl9lS0s?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 BIG: The SEC says most crypt…

item.title: SEC Declares 'Most Crypto Assets' Not Securities, Including Staking, Airdrops and Bitcoin Mining
item.description: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said the new securities guidance, which impacts "most crypto assets," provides "clear lines in clear terms."

item.title: TODAY 🚨: The Commission issued an interpretation that clarifies the application of federal securities laws to crypto assets. This is a major step to provide greater clarity regarding the Commission’s treatment of crypto assets. Read the release here: ow.ly/XhhV - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5QLURWUU0xLWxpOEhNUTY4N2Y1VTZidlAyMHB3UURBWHhEcnVOTG5TWkR4eEJlTWR5ZzY2SmNrYzN5dzgtVzBMeFBFdHAxbU5CZXpBZW5XYXpjb2c?oc=5" target="_blank">TODAY 🚨: The Commission issued an interpre…

item.title: 🚨JUST IN: The @SECGov and @CFTC have issued joint, Commission-level interpretive guidance outlining how federal securities laws apply to certain crypto assets and transactions. This follows a submission to OIRA earlier this month signaling the agencies’ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1hcUptSkhHU3lBTlBXQUUtTk9rc00zMS1mUWlyVy13bHo4WUdVOERVTFJfYkdCLUxFN1FmZWRaSTczUTd4bjgtclV6UnIzV2l2RWRjWlRqTXlpSnR6UWg4bUhvVkVKUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨JUST IN: The @SECGov and @…

item.title: What If Elon Musk's Grok Leaks Classified Info? Elizabeth Warren Is Worried—The Pentagon Isn't
item.description: Sen. Warren is demanding answers after the Pentagon handed Elon Musk's xAI classified network access—despite NSA warnings and a trail of harmful AI outputs.

item.title: Tether launches AI training framework for smartphones and consumer GPUs
item.description: Part of the QVAC platform, the framework can use non-Nvidia hardware, expanding support beyond the dominant GPUs typically used for AI training.

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, Which Could Be More Useful Than the Big Model
item.description: OpenAI's new small models are faster and cheaper than GPT-5.4, and for most everyday use cases, that's exactly what developers and businesses actually need.

item.title: Mastercard's $1.8 billion deal 'a clear answer' to a massive shift in the global payment war
item.description: Analysts say the $1.8 billion acquisition shows stablecoins are moving from niche use to global settlement rails.

item.title: Arizona AG files charges against Kalshi over ‘illegal gambling‘
item.description: A Kalshi spokesperson said that the criminal case was based on ”paper-thin arguments” and claimed the company was exclusively under federal jurisdiction.

item.title: SOL price signal tied to previous 142% rally flashes again: Are the bulls back?
item.description: A SOL chart pattern that preceded several triple-digit rallies just flashed again. Are the altcoin bulls gearing up for a run to new price highs?

item.title: Urea Surges 34% as Iran Conflict Ripples Through Commodities, Bitcoin
item.description: The Iran conflict is impacting on commodities beyond oil, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz chokes off shipping.

item.title: VersaBank expands tokenized deposits with cross-border FX use case
item.description: The Canadian bank added USD–CAD conversion to its tokenized deposits, enabling real-time cross-border transactions as banks test blockchain-based settlement systems.

item.title: Arizona Attorney General files criminal charges against prediction market Kalshi
item.description: Kris Mayes filed 20 criminal counts against the prediction market operator, escalating a multi-state legal clash over sports and election predictions markets.

item.title: PayPal Expands PYUSD Stablecoin Globally as Supply Tops $4 Billion
item.description: PayPal’s PYUSD is expanding to a total of 70 international markets as the payments giant’s stablecoin tops a $4 billion market cap.

item.title: Democrats Target Prediction Market Insider Trading, Claim Trump Allies Are Profiting
item.description: Democratic lawmakers introduced legislation prohibiting prediction markets that hinge on government action or pre-determined outcomes.

item.title: GSR acquires Autonomous, Architech as it builds crypto capital markets platform
item.description: With the combined $57 million deal, GSR looks to integrate token launches, liquidity and treasury into a single capital markets stack for crypto projects.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis sees $68K support as gold slips at key $5K level
item.description: Bitcoin consolidated recent gains in the face of blanket skepticism over its rebound, while gold threatened to give up $5,000 support.

item.title: CFTC issues 'no-action' letter for crypto wallet provider Phantom
item.description: The no-action position taken by the US regulator under Chair Michael Selig will allow the company to engage in certain activities without registering as a broker.

item.title: Allium Brings 65TB of Data from Bitcoin, Ethereum, Sui and More to Walrus
item.description: The partnership aims to lay the foundations for the agentic workflows that will become increasingly important to on-chain finance.

item.title: Facing a crisis, Bitcoin treasury companies need to pivot to survive
item.description: Here, Wellener offers tactics that firms must use to prove they’re more than just a crypto play.

item.title: Theo closes $100M facility backing gold-linked yield stablecoin
item.description: A new gold-linked yield stablecoin aims to tap commodity markets for returns as institutions explore alternatives to Treasury-backed tokens.

item.title: XRP Flips BNB, Hitting Highest Price in a Month as Ripple Plans to Seek Brazil License
item.description: The Ripple-linked XRP has leapfrogged BNB in market cap as the crypto payments firm expands its Brazil push.

item.title: World launches AgentKit with Coinbase integration to enable human-verified AI agents
item.description: The new toolkit from Sam Altman's startup lets AI agents prove they are backed by a unique human while interacting with websites, APIs and other online services.

item.title: Strategy’s latest massive bitcoin purchase offers insight into its evolving funding model
item.description: A $1.18 billion preferred stock raise, roughly equivalent to 16,800 BTC, signals a shift away from common stock as dividend obligations top $1 billion.

item.title: March 1st incident report On March 1, 2026, Bitrefill was the target of a cyberattack. Based on indicators observed during the investigation - including the modus operandi, the malware used, on-chain tracing and reused IP + email addresses (!) - we find many s - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9xX1Qyc0hWNnVyVU1oRjcxTEFSdmZrWTFEZldfaFlaLUlBeWxQRGxXN3BGZGxVc2w2ZjNPNEpQZGdnT2FCNTRWdzB4VDE4dTM5OWlNOTI0Yjl5UV9HNE1v?oc=5" target="_blank">March 1st incident report On March 1, …

item.title: Strategy halts Bitcoin buying via STRC: Will BTC price dip again?
item.description: Strategy often pauses BTC buys when STRC falls below $100, a setup that has previously coincided with 25%–40% Bitcoin declines.

item.title: Popular Solana wallet Phantom wins CFTC nod to access regulated derivatives markets
item.description: This means Phantom can act as a non-custodial interface connecting users to registered derivatives platforms, removing the need for broker registration under specific conditions.

item.title: Sam Altman’s World Taps Coinbase’s Open Protocol to Verify Humans Behind AI Agents
item.description: A new toolkit aims to allow AI agents to prove that a real person stands behind them when interacting online.

item.title: Sam Altman's World teams up with Coinbase to prove there is a real person behind every AI transaction
item.description: World said some estimates suggest agentic commerce could reach $3 trillion to $5 trillion by 2030, with agents accounting for up to 25% of U.S. e-commerce.

item.title: Vietnam pushes local crypto exchanges as Hanoi moves to block offshore trading: Reuters
item.description: The move aims to regulate the country's growing crypto market and restrict trading on foreign platforms.

item.title: Robinhood’s new venture fund just snapped up stakes in Stripe and ElevenLabs
item.description: The closed-end fund aims to give everyday investors exposure to private firms before they go public.

item.title: XRP holders hit a record 7.7M: Will price break through $1.60 next?
item.description: XRP’s road to recovery will pick up momentum if network usage continues rising and bulls push the price above the $1.60 resistance.

item.title: 'Gensler and Biden were just better for crypto,' says Tally CEO as DAO governance platform shuts down
item.description: End of DAOs? Firm behind Uniswap and Arbitrum governance says easing regulation made decentralization optional

item.title: Crypto trading firm GSR expands token advisory with $57 million in acquisitions
item.description: The firm, best known for being one of the oldest crypto market makers, acquired Autonomous and Architech to combine token launch services, trading and treasury management tools.

item.title: Mastercard agrees to acquire BVNK in $1.8B stablecoin deal
item.description: Mastercard agreed to acquire BVNK for up to $1.8 billion as it expands further into stablecoin and blockchain-based payments.

item.title: U.S. Democrats target government officials gaming prediction markets on war action
item.description: Potential indicators of prior-knowledge bets on U.S. military action spurred Democrats from the Senate and House of Representatives to introduce a new bill.

item.title: Maestro launches mining-backed Bitcoin credit market for institutions
item.description: Maestro launched Mezzamine, a Bitcoin credit market linking institutional BTC holders with miners seeking capital backed by mining output.

item.title: Morning Minute: Strategy's $1.58B Buy Pushes Bitcoin to $75k
item.description: Strategy just made its biggest Bitcoin buy of 2026, and Kalshi is running a $1 billion March Madness bracket contest.

item.title: Mastercard to Acquire Stablecoin Tech Firm BVNK for Up to $1.8 Billion
item.description: Mastercard said Tuesday that it will acquire stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK in an effort to connect fiat and crypto payment rails.

item.title: U.S. regional banks building tokenized deposit network on ZKsync to rival stablecoins
item.description: The Cari Network is targeting a 2026 rollout as banks test issuance, transfers and redemption of digital deposits. Participating banks include Huntington Bancshares, First Horizon, M&T Bank, KeyCorp and Old National Bancorp.

item.title: PayPal expands PYUSD stablecoin to users in 70 countries
item.description: PayPal is rolling out its PYUSD stablecoin in 68 additional countries beyond the US and UK, aiming to reduce cross-border fees and offer rewards on holdings.

item.title: ‘Bitcoin Standard’ author explores reality where decentralized gold stopped WWI
item.description: Saifedean Ammous, the author of The Bitcoin Standard, released an alternate history last fall, in which a decentralized gold system uproots central banking.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 4.1%, leading index lower
item.description: Sui (SUI) joined Uniswap (UNI) as an underperformer, declining 4% from Monday.

item.title: Ripple looks to expand crypto and payment services in Brazil
item.description: The blockchain firm is adding custody, payments and brokerage tools for digital asset management and tokenization as it plans to apply for regulatory approval from the central bank.

item.title: Theo Taps Gold Futures for Yield-Bearing Stablecoin Amid $100 Million Raise
item.description: Tokenization platform Theo plans to introduce a "gold-powered" stablecoin, which is set to generate yield from two independent sources.

item.title: Citigroup cuts BTC and ETH targets as U.S. crypto legislation stalls
item.description: The Wall Street investment bank cited slower ETF flows, weak network activity and a narrowing window for U.S. regulatory catalysts.
